title: F-15 Seen Crashing On Camera, Kuwait Says Several US Warplanes Fell
summary_full: Iran claimed Monday it shot down a F-15 fighter jet as the war with US-backed Israel entered a third day, dragging the West Asia region and the world into a second major military conflict.
summary_public: Iran claimed Monday it shot down a F-15 fighter jet as the war with US-backed Israel entered a third day, dragging the West Asia region and the world into a second major military conflict.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran claimed Monday it shot down a F-15 fighter jet
